prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年新疆大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别约14727名、14711名、13837名、14725名、17050名。2021–2024年位次在13800–14700区间窄幅波动，202 5年出现明显后移，较2024年后移约2325名，基准位次为17050名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年6人、2022年14人、2023年14人、2024年20人、2025年3 4人，呈持续扩招态势。2026年计划招生72人，较2025年大幅扩招约112%，是近年来最大幅度的扩招，将显著加剧报考竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
新疆大学是国 家211工程和双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第131名（2026年），属于中后段211院校，近年排名基本稳定在120–136名区间；该校在2021–2026年声 誉评价文件中均无显著舆情记录，整体声誉平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第72位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约38万，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现高热关注或负面事件。
5. 【优势学科】新疆大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科以B类为主，整体学科竞争力在211院校中处于中等偏后水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业 涵盖计算机科学与技术、软件工程、电气工程及其自动化等当前社会高热推荐专业，以及法学、汉语言文学等文科热门专业，专业热度整体偏正面；天津市2026年普通高考考生总 数约8.2万人（含不确定标记），较2025年7.19万人增加约14%，省内竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2021–2025年从463分缓慢升至476分，整体平稳；新疆大学位 于新疆乌鲁木齐市，距天津市较远，属于西部高校；该校在天津招生占比近年持续提升（从2021年6人增至2026年72人），但绝对招生人数仍较小，天津考生对西部高校存在一定 地域偏好差异。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年招生计划较2025年扩招约112%（从34人增至72人）带来的竞争加剧、天津市考生总数增加约14%等因素， 在2025年基准17050名基础上预计位次将大幅后移。预测2026年最低录取位次约28534名，区间28034–29034名。扩招是位次后移的最关键因素，考生规模增长为次要加剧因素。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年新疆大学在天津市大幅扩招，预测位次约28534名，区间28034–29034名。位次在预测区间下限（28034名）以内可重点冲刺一档计算机、软件工程等热门专业；位次在区间 中段（约28534名）建议以二档专业为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（29034名）附近建议以三档专业保底，优先选择汉语言文学、金融学等文科热门或能源化学工程等工科 专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xinjiang University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 14727, 14711, 13837, 14725, and 17050 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 13800–14700 range, but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, moving back about 2325 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of 17050. The enrollment plan for Xinjiang University in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 6 students in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 34 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 72 students, a substantial increase of about 112% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly intensify competition for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 131st on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), belonging to the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities, with rankings generally stable in the 120–136 range in recent years. The university has no significant public opinion records in reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, maintaining a stable overall reputation. On Douyin, the school's overall popularity ranking is 72nd, rated as "average," with a comprehensive popularity of about 380,000, and short video exposure at a medium-low level, without high attention or negative incidents. 5. [Advantage Disciplines] Xinjiang University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with advantage disciplines mainly at the B level, and overall discipline competitiveness is at a mid-to-late level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the enrollment majors include computer science and technology, software engineering, electrical engineering and automation, and other currently highly recommended popular majors in society, as well as popular liberal arts majors such as law and Chinese language and literature, with overall positive major popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin ordinary college entrance examination is about 82,000 (including uncertain marks), an increase of about 14% compared to 71,900 in 2025, intensifying competition within the province. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) slowly rose from 463 points to 476 points from 2021 to 2025, remaining generally stable. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Tianjin, and is a western university. The proportion of enrollment in Tianjin has been increasing in recent years (from 6 students in 2021 to 72 in 2026), but the absolute number of enrolled students is still small, and Tianjin candidates have certain regional preference differences towards western universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the intensified competition due to the 2026 enrollment plan expanding by about 112% compared to 2025 (from 34 to 72 students), and the increase in the total number of candidates in Tianjin by about 14%, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 17050. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 28534, with a range of 28034–29034. Expansion is the most critical factor for the ranking shift, with the increase in candidate numbers being a secondary intensifying factor.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Xinjiang University has significantly expanded enrollment in Tianjin, with a predicted ranking of about 28534, range 28034–29034. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the prediction range (28034) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like computer science and software engineering; those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 28534) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors while also considering Tier 1 as a reach; candidates near the upper limit of the range (29034) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing popular liberal arts majors like Chinese language and literature and finance, or engineering majors like energy chemical engineering.
